creator: freebsd@linepoint.com
text:
Update of haproxy (development branch) to v1.5-dev4

Includes many many updates (although mostly internal)

Fix: PORTNAME=      haproxy
-DISTVERSION=   1.5-dev3
+DISTVERSION=   1.5-dev4
 CATEGORIES=    net
 MASTER_SITES=  http://haproxy.1wt.eu/download/1.5/src/devel/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX= -devel
@@ -17,7 +14,7 @@
 LICENSE_COMB=  multi
 LICENSE=       GPLv2 LGPL21

-CONFLICTS=     haproxy-1.[24]\.*
+CONFLICTS=     haproxy-[1234567890]\*
 USE_RC_SUBR=   haproxy
 USE_GMAKE=     YES
 SUB_FILES=     pkg-message
